td.div: English: Logo of Meta Platforms, Inc.

table.style: border:2px solid #ddd; clear: both; margin: 0.5em auto; text-align: center; width: 100%

tr.td: This image has an extracted file: Meta Platforms logo.svg.

div.div: This vector image was created with Inkscape, and then manually edited.

table.style: width: 100%; clear: both; margin: 0.5em auto; background-color: var(--background-color-progressive-subtle, #f7f8ff); color: var(--color-base, #202122); border: var(--border-subtle, 2px solid #8888aa); border-spacing: 8px; padding: 0px;

div.i: This logo image consists only of simple geometric shapes or text. It does not meet the threshold of originality needed for copyright protection, and is therefore in the public domain. Although it is free of copyright restrictions, this image may still be subject to other restrictions. See WP:PD § Fonts and typefaces or Template talk:PD-textlogo for more information.

table.style: width:100%; clear:both; margin:0.5em auto; border-spacing:8px; background-color:var(--background-color-neutral-subtle,#f7f8ff); border:2px solid #8888aa;color: inherit;

tr.td:
This work includes material that may be protected as a trademark in some jurisdictions. If you want to use it, you have to ensure that you have the legal right to do so and that you do not infringe any trademark rights. See our general disclaimer.
This tag does not indicate the copyright status of the attached work. A normal copyright tag is still required. See Commons:Licensing.

table.style: width:100%; clear:both; margin:0.5em auto; background-color: var(--background-color-success-subtle, #e8f8e8); color: var(--color-base, #202122); border-width: var(--border-width-base, 1px); border-style: solid; border-color: var(--border-color-success, #80d080); box-sizing: border-box; padding: 0; border-spacing: 8px;

td.div: There are many logos and trademarks in the United States that are not protected by copyright because they are below the threshold of originality required for copyright protection. There are some cases that even logos and trademarks that have been judged to be copyrighted in foreign countries have also been judged not to be copyrighted in the United States. However, some logos and trademarks are copyrighted in the United States. See COM:CRT/United States#Threshold of originality for more information.

div.p: Click on a date/time to view the file as it appeared at that time.

tr.td: Reverted to version as of 12:39, 1 December 2021 (UTC); the “optimised” version of 25 November is four times larger file edited with Inkscape with unnecessary clipping and transformations, without any improvements. Please don’t edit file with Inkscape, use a text editor if you find need for improvements, and justify changes, if you know what you are doing.
